title: notopleura guadalupensis subsp. tetrapyrena
intro: Notopleura guadalupensis subsp. tetrapyrena is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly referred to as a medicinal herb. This plant is traditionally used to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Notopleura guadalupensis subsp. tetrapyrena include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an antispasmodic agent, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Notopleura guadalupensis subsp. tetrapyrena is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, it may also be used in capsule or tincture form for its medicinal and health benefits.
